name: Woof
description: The 'Woof' dog hoodie is crafted with comfort and style in mind, designed to keep your furry friend cozy during chilly walks or lazy lounging. Made from premium, soft fabric, this hoodie ensures warmth while allowing for easy movement. Its stylish design features a snug fit and an easy-to-use fastening system, making it a practical and fashionable choice for any dog lover.
dimensions: Length: 18 inches, Width: 12 inches, Neck: 14 inches

name: Creati Pen
description: The 'Creati Pen' is an essential tool for artists and creatives, designed for precision and ease. Its fine tip allows for intricate lines and details, making it perfect for sketching, drawing, and adding finishing touches to your artwork. The pen features quick-drying, smudge-resistant ink that ensures your work remains clean and crisp. The ergonomic design offers a comfortable grip for extended use.

name: Game Boy
description: The 'Game Boy' is a refurbished classic gaming console that brings retro gaming nostalgia to life. This customized version has been carefully restored to ensure optimal performance and includes a selection of beloved classic games. Its sleek, portable design makes it easy to carry and play on the go. Whether you're a collector or a gamer, this Game Boy offers hours of entertainment and a touch of vintage charm.
features: Includes a selection of classic games
dimensions: Length: 5 inches, Width: 3 inches, Height: 1.5 inches

name: Treasure Map
description: The 'Treasure Map' is a beautifully hand-drawn piece that evokes a sense of adventure and exploration. This map is meticulously aged to provide an authentic, antique look, making it an eye-catching addition to any room. Whether you're a history buff or a fan of treasure hunts, this map serves as both a unique decorative element and a conversation starter. It’s perfect for framing and displaying in your home or office.
features: Aged paper for an authentic look

name: Soy Candle
description: The 'Soy Candle' is a hand-poured creation that adds warmth and relaxation to any environment. Made from natural soy wax and infused with essential oils, it provides a clean burn and a soothing aroma. Each candle is crafted with care, ensuring high-quality performance and a pleasing aesthetic. Ideal for creating a calm atmosphere in your home or as a thoughtful gift for someone special.

name: Custom Hotwheels
description: The 'Custom Hotwheels' collection features uniquely hand-painted toy cars that stand out in any collection. Each car is individually designed, offering exclusive artwork and vibrant colors that make these models a standout choice for collectors and enthusiasts alike. These limited edition pieces combine creativity with nostalgia, making them a perfect gift for any Hotwheels fan.
dimensions: Length: 2.5 inches, Width: 1 inch, Height: 1 inch

name: Personalised Journal
description: The 'Personalised Journal' is a beautifully crafted journal tailored to your individual style. Featuring a customizable cover and high-quality paper, it’s perfect for jotting down notes, ideas, or sketches. With its elegant design and practical features, this journal makes an excellent gift or a personal keepsake for anyone who loves to write or create.

name: Diamond Ring
description: The 'Diamond Ring' is a luxurious and timeless piece of jewelry, meticulously crafted to highlight the brilliance of its diamonds. Each ring is hand-finished to ensure the highest quality and features a classic design that makes it suitable for any special occasion. Perfect as an engagement ring or a cherished gift, this piece combines elegance with exceptional craftsmanship.

name: Trust Fields
description: The 'Trust Fields' artwork is an evocative piece that captures the serenity and expansiveness of open landscapes. This original work features intricate details and vibrant colors, making it a captivating focal point for any room. Perfect for art collectors and enthusiasts, it brings a touch of nature and beauty into your space, ready to frame and display.

name: Metal Cup
description: The 'Metal Cup' is a sleek and durable drinking vessel made from high-quality stainless steel. Designed to keep beverages hot or cold for extended periods, this cup combines functionality with a modern aesthetic. Ideal for everyday use, it’s perfect for those who appreciate both form and function in their drinkware.

name: Desk Organizer
description: The 'Desk Organizer' is a beautifully handcrafted piece designed to enhance your workspace. Made from premium wood, it features multiple compartments for pens, notebooks, and other office essentials. Its elegant design not only keeps your desk tidy but also adds a touch of sophistication to your work environment.
dimensions: Length: 12 inches, Width: 8 inches, Height: 5 inches

name: Knitted Beanie
description: The 'Knitted Beanie' is a cozy and stylish accessory, hand-knitted with soft, high-quality yarn. Designed to keep you warm during colder months, this beanie offers both comfort and fashion. Its stretchy fabric ensures a snug fit, making it a perfect addition to any winter wardrobe. Available in a variety of colors to suit your style.
